convert
$I(s)=\frac{E}{s}·\frac{1}{sL+R+\frac{1}{sC}}$
to
$F(s)=\frac{N(s)}{sD(s)}$
to
$f(t)=\frac{N(0)}{D(0)}+\sum^\infty_{k=1} \frac{N(s_{k})}{s_{k}D(s_{k})} e^{s_{1}t}$

$I(s)=\frac{E}{s}·\frac{1}{sL+R+\frac{1}{sC}}=\frac{E}{s}·\frac{sC}{s^{2}LC+sRC+1}$=$\frac{EC}{LC}·\frac{s}{s\left( s^{2}+s \frac{RC}{LC}+\frac{1}{LC} \right)}$=
$\frac{E}{L} \frac{s}{s(s-s_{1})(s-s_{2})}$
$N(s)=s$
$D(s)=(s-s_{1})(s-s_{2})$
$D'(s)=s-s_{2}+s-s_{2}$
$\Delta=\left( \frac{R}{L} \right)^{2}-\frac{4}{LC}$
$\left( \frac{R}{L} \right)^{2}=\frac{4}{LC}$
$R=2\sqrt{ \frac{L}{C} }$

Overdamped response
$\Delta>0\to$

-2.43,-0.09 -2.42,-0.39 -2.33,-0.67 -2.25,-0.95 -2.10,-1.21 -1.96,-1.47 -1.96,-1.47 L -1.96,-1.47 Z"></path></g></svg>
$s_{1}=-\frac{1}{T_{1}}$
---

Critically damped
$\Delta=0\to$


---
Over damped
$\Delta<0\to s_{1,2}=-\alpha\pm j\omega$

$i(t)=\frac{E}{L}\left[ 0+\frac{s_{1}}{s_{1}(s_{1}-s_{2})}e^{ s_{1}t }+\frac{s_{2}}{s_{2}(s_{2}-s_{1})}e^{ s_{2}t } \right]\mathbb{1}(t)$=
=$\frac{E}{L} \frac{1}{s_{1}-s_{2}}[e^{ s_{1}t }-e^{ s_{2}t }]\mathbb{1}(t)$=
=$\frac{E}{L}·\frac{1}{2j\omega}[e^{ (-\alpha+j\omega)t }-e^{(-\alpha-j\omega)t}]\mathbb{1}(t)$=
$=\frac{E}{L} \frac{1}{2j\omega}e^{ -\alpha t }[e^{ j\omega t }-e^{ -j\omega t }]\mathbb{1}(t)=$
=$\frac{E}{L} \frac{1}{\omega}e^{ -\alpha t }\sin(\omega t)\mathbb{1}(t)$
